extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial peak and drop (around index 10), the series stays mostly in a mid-range band (roughly 0.35–0.6) for a long central section, without touching very low values.
R2: In the late section (after index ~45), the series rises again and remains in a moderate band (about 0.35–0.55) without a clear strong recovery to high values.
R3: There is no long sustained segment near the lower boundary (below ~0.15); low points in the middle/late parts are brief and isolated.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the middle of the series (roughly indices 15–40), values also stay in a mid-range band (about 0.35–0.6), similarly to Class 0.
R2: After a sharp drop in the late section (around indices 45–55), the series recovers strongly and ends clearly higher than its post-drop minimum, rising back to around 0.5–0.65.
R3: The late recovery segment (after index ~55) has an overall increasing trend, rather than a flat or slightly declining pattern.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15% of time, the value decreases from a moderate level (around mid‑range) toward a local minimum near 0.2–0.3, rather than starting at a very high peak.
R2: In the middle part (about 20–60% of time), the series stays mostly in a mid to high band (roughly 0.4–0.7) without extremely low dips.
R3: Near the end (last 20–30% of time), the series shows a clear, relatively smooth rise from a low point (around 0.1–0.2) back up toward mid values (~0.4–0.5), without sharp oscillations.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Very early (first 5–10% of time), the series starts high and quickly reaches a clear peak near the top of the range (around 0.7–0.8) before dropping.
R2: In the middle part (about 20–60% of time), the series alternates between mid and high levels (roughly 0.4–0.7) and often contains a tall central peak, rather than staying flat.
R3: In the last 30% of time, the series oscillates in a mid band (around 0.4–0.6) without a pronounced final upward ramp from a very low value.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial drop, the series stays mostly within a middle band (roughly 0.35–0.6) for an extended central segment, without long flat plateaus.  
R2: The main global maximum occurs in the central part (about one-third to halfway along the time axis), not near the end.  
R3: The final segment shows only a modest rise, ending in the mid-range (around 0.45–0.6) and not at a clear global peak.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial drop, the series enters a long middle section where values oscillate gently but remain within a narrower mid-range band, producing a noticeably flatter “platform” than in class 0.  
R2: A pronounced local maximum appears later in the series (around the last third of the time axis), typically higher than earlier central peaks.  
R3: The final values tend to level off into a short, nearly flat segment in the mid-range, rather than continuing to rise or clearly decline.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial peak and drop (around time 5–10), the series stays mostly between 0.3 and 0.6 for a long middle segment (roughly time 15–40).  
R2: There is a pronounced deep valley in the second half (roughly time 40–55) where values fall close to 0.1–0.2.  
R3: After this deep valley, the series recovers to a moderate level (around 0.4–0.5) but does not form a tall peak again before the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial peak and drop (around time 5–10), the series climbs to a higher mid‑segment peak (around time 30–40) reaching roughly 0.7–0.8.  
R2: Following this tall mid‑segment peak, there is a deep valley (around time 45–55) where values approach 0.1–0.2.  
R3: After the deep valley, the series rises again to a moderate level (around 0.4–0.5) and stays relatively stable without a strong downtrend to the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After an initial drop, the middle section (roughly indices 20–45) stays mostly in a mid-range plateau around 0.45–0.6, without a strong, smooth upward trend.
R2: Around index 40–50 there is a sharp fall from a high value (≈0.7–0.8) down close to the minimum range (≈0.1–0.2).
R3: Near the end (indices 55–70), the series recovers only to mid values (≈0.4–0.55) and stays roughly flat without a clear upward slope.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial drop, the middle section (roughly indices 15–45) shows a clear overall upward movement, climbing from low values (≈0.2–0.3) up to higher values (≈0.6–0.75).
R2: As in class 0, there is a pronounced peak followed by a deep valley in the middle–late part (roughly indices 35–55).
R3: In the last part (indices 55–70), the series not only recovers from the valley but also shows a noticeable upward trend, ending at higher values (≈0.55–0.65) than the preceding plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial sharp drop (within the first ~10 time steps), the series stays mostly in a mid-range plateau (around 0.35–0.55) between about time 15 and 40, with only small local wiggles rather than large spikes.
R2: In the later part (after about time 40), the series shows at most one clear deep dip below ~0.2, and otherwise oscillates in a mid-range band without a very tall, isolated peak.
R3: Across the whole series, there is no single, very pronounced spike that is much higher than the surrounding values; rises and falls are more gradual and of similar height.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: After the initial sharp drop (within the first ~10 time steps), the series quickly recovers into a mid-range region but then contains a clearly visible, tall, isolated peak (around time 35–45) that stands distinctly above neighboring values.
R2: That tall peak is followed by a steep decline into a pronounced low (below ~0.15–0.2) shortly afterward (around time 45–55), forming a sharp peak–valley pattern.
R3: In the final segment (after ~time 55), the series rebounds from that low into a relatively stable mid-to-high plateau (around 0.45–0.6), without returning to the very low values seen just before.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After the initial drop (around index 5–10), the signal stays mostly low in the first half: the average value from index 10 to 30 is below 0.45.  
R2: In the second half there is a pronounced deep valley: at least one point between index 35 and 55 falls below 0.25.  
R3: After that deep valley, the series recovers but stays moderate: the average value from index 55 to the end is between 0.35 and 0.55.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first half, the signal does not remain as low: the average value from index 10 to 30 is at least 0.45.  
R2: Any valley in the middle of the series is less deep: all values between index 35 and 55 are above 0.20.  
R3: The second half is slightly higher on average than for class 0: the average value from index 55 to the end is at least 0.45.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: Starts high (above 0.6) and quickly falls to a pronounced low (below 0.2) within the first 15 time steps.  
R2: Contains a clear, isolated main peak in the middle region (around time 30–45) that rises above 0.7 and then falls back to around 0.2 or lower.  
R3: Ends with a moderate recovery, finishing in the last 10–15 time steps between 0.4 and 0.6 without another very sharp peak or deep valley.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Starts high (above 0.5–0.6) and also dips early, but the first low stays slightly higher on average (often around 0.2–0.3 rather than persistently near 0.1).  
R2: Middle region (time 20–45) is more plateau‑like, hovering mostly between 0.4 and 0.6, sometimes with two close peaks rather than one sharp isolated spike.  
R3: After a late deep dip (near or below 0.1 around time 45–55), the series rises and then stabilizes, ending fairly flat in the last 10–15 time steps around 0.35–0.45 rather than clearly trending upward.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The maximum value in the first 10% of the series is high (> 0.6).
R2: The minimum value between 40% and 70% of the series is very low (< 0.15).
R3: After this very low point, the series recovers and ends above 0.35.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The maximum value in the first 10% of the series is very high (> 0.7).
R2: The minimum value between 40% and 70% of the series is low but not as deep (between 0.15 and 0.25).
R3: After this low point, the series recovers and ends between 0.35 and 0.55.
